Description

  • Uses of Connector in BusinessLayer

    Methods in BusinessLayer that return Connector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Connector
    Connector.cloneConnector(Pin newSource, Pin newTarget)
    Clones the connector and connects it to new pins.
    Methods in BusinessLayer that return types with arguments of type Connector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<Connector>
    Pin.getConnectedWires()
    Returns a list of all connectors connected to this pin.
    ArrayList<Connector>
    Circuit.getConnectors()
    Return a list of connectors in the circuit
    Methods in BusinessLayer with parameters of type Connector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Canvas.addConnector(Connector c)
    Adds a connector to the canvas and circuit.
    void
    Circuit.addConnector(Connector connector)
    Adds a connector (wire) to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
    void
    Pin.addWire(Connector wire)
    Adds a connector (wire) to this pin.
    void
    Circuit.removeConnector(Connector connector)
    Removes a connector (wire) from the circuit.
    void
    Pin.removeWire(Connector wire)
    Removes a connector (wire) from this pin.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Circuit.setConnectors(ArrayList<Connector> connectors)
    Sets the list of connectors (wires) in the circuit.
